stemHtml: What is correct regarding antenna shadowing?

options.a: Poor reception of GPS signals due to very weak signals compared to the background noise at that frequency.
options.b: Protection of a radar-reception antenna from the strong signals produced by a nearby transmission antenna.
options.c: Terrain blocking the path between the transmitter and receiver/aircraft antenna.
options.d: Reduced reception by an antenna when part of the airframe blocks the signal to the antenna.
